message:
chore: update beads issue tracker and audit index

Sync .beads/issues.jsonl with recently closed audit findings (batch 496+)
including the AsyncDbPool try_get orphan fix, RegionBridge snapshot time
propagation, and several other resolved items.

audit_index.jsonl updated with new entries tracking the latest audit
batch outputs and their verification status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
